name: graphify-to-kuzu
description: Convert graphify graph.json (NetworkX node-link format) into a typed KuzuDB graph database with classified node types (File, Class, Function, Method, Document, Rationale) and semantic relationship tables (CONTAINS, CALLS, INHERITS, IMPORTS, HAS_METHOD, USES, RATIONALE_FOR, REFERENCES, SIMILAR_TO), queryable with Cypher.
